founder_likes: tool → industry → use case → pain point → CTA
Indian business examples with Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm, WhatsApp and Google Maps where relevant
founder_dislikes: content not tied to a BharathQR tool or commercial use case

preferred_reference_sites.lesson: Commercial-intent blog/tool strategy: every article maps to a tool and business use case.
Use-case and cases directory structure for internal linking.
Physical material pages like brochures, posters, packaging and table tents.

content_rules: Title must include the primary keyword.
First 100 words must include primary keyword, business keyword, pain point and benefit.
Every article must promote exactly one primary BharathQR tool.
Every article must include a clear CTA to the matching BharathQR page.
Use intent-rich paragraphs, not keyword stuffing.
